title: Ethiopian Ackee Stir Fry
description: A flavorful stir fry from Ethiopia using ackee fruit, served with crunchy fried onions. This dish is a delicious twist on traditional Ethiopian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Ethiopian Berbere Spice
ingredients.notes: Available at most international grocery stores

instructions: Heat floral oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions and stir-fry until golden brown.
Add ackee fruit and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add Ethiopian Berbere Spice and stir-fry for another minute.
Serve hot garnished with crunchy fried onions.
